Dear [Customer Name],

We hope this message finds you well. As part of our ongoing efforts to enhance the security of your account, we are requesting your assistance in verifying your personal details to ensure uninterrupted service and continued access to your account.

**Please take a moment to confirm your information** by clicking the link below:

[Verify Account Details](https://secure.bankwebsite.com/verify)

This verification is required to protect your account from unauthorized access and to ensure that all transactions are processed securely.

**Important:**  
This verification is only valid for the next 24 hours. If you do not complete the verification within this time frame, your account may be temporarily restricted.

Should you have any questions or need further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact our customer support team at [support@bankwebsite.com](mailto:support@bankwebsite.com) or call us at [1-800-XXX-XXXX].

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Warm regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Title]  
[Bank Name]

Dear Valued Customer,

We have recently detected unusual activity on your account and need to verify your personal details to ensure the security of your information. To protect your account, please verify your details by clicking on the link below:

[Verify Your Account](https://verify.accountsecurity.com)

Best regards,  
Bank Security Team  
[Bank Name]  
[Bank Website URL]  
[Phone Number]

---
